objective: Create a synthetic fixture harness that verifies the V3.78 MARKET label sample validator correctly handles pass, fail, and warning cases before any real provider sample is accepted.
forbidden: Do not run V3.53 or generate labels.
Do not run portfolio validation, NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, portfolio-return, or model promotion outputs.
Do not treat synthetic fixture pass as real provider approval.
acceptance_criteria: At least six synthetic fixtures are generated under the V3.79 output directory.
Expected-vs-actual regression results pass for all declared cases.
At least one positive sample and at least four negative samples are observed.
The outlier case is warning-only and still routed to V3.75 review.
Target CSV write and V3.53 execution remain blocked.
failure_conditions: Any expected fixture case fails regression.
The target CSV is written by this task.
Any label, portfolio, or model-promotion output is generated.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion output scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: Use V3.79 as the regression guard for future V3.78 changes and real provider-sample intake.
